mode_rationale: Per the phase guard (phase=LIVE, simulation=false, start_date set) this run is nominally LIVE, not PREPARATION. However NO villa-campaign lead source is provisioned or reachable in this scheduled session, so live polling is physically impossible. As on prior days, the one reachable lead-bearing connector (Gmail) was probed to confirm no leads are silently capturable elsewhere. No leads were read, recorded, or escalated. A readiness/blocker report is the correct output.
note_on_run_time: Scheduled-task fire time continues to drift from the documented 13:00 PHT slot. Recommendation unchanged: align the scheduled-tasks cron with the documented PHT slot, or rewrite the agent prompt to reflect the actual fire time.

gmail.query: newer_than:2d (lead OR inquiry OR villa OR Panglao OR investment OR "contact form" OR "Blue Everest" OR primevilla OR hebrew lead/investment terms)
gmail.note: Four threads returned, none a villa lead: (1) a Blueprint contractor inquiry thread (off-limits separate business, ignored); (2) two Google Ads admin notifications dated 2026-06-10 about a new manager-level user 'Panglao Prime Villas (412-857-2394)' added to the Google Ads account; (3) one unrelated monday.com newsletter. No website contact-form lead notifications and no inbound inquiry emails for the villa campaign. Consistent with every prior LEAD_CHECK sweep.

google_sheets.note: The lead sheet 'PANGLAO PRIME VILLAS - LEAD PIPELINE' (owner ceo@blue-everest.com) is evidenced by a prior Drive share notification, but no Google Sheets/Drive MCP connector is present in this session's tool inventory, lead_check_state.json.lead_source_sheet is null on all three fields, and header_row_validated=false. There is nothing this agent can poll.

wati.note: campaign_state.json platforms.wati.status='not_setup'. No account, no Client ID, no registered sales-agent WA number. Inbound WhatsApp lead ingestion is unavailable AND outbound HOT-lead escalation to the sales agent cannot be automated.

hubspot.note: campaign_state.json platforms.hubspot.status='not_setup'. No CRM destination, no deal pipeline, no owner routing.

brevo.note: campaign_state.json platforms.brevo.status reads 'active' (templates=10, lists=5, drip_sequence=true). No Brevo MCP is reachable to verify, and LEAD_CHECK does not write to Brevo. Confirm the account/lists/drip exist before treating the lead -> email-nurture path as functional.

meta_lead_ads.note: Meta Ads MCP is reachable. Two campaigns (IL-1, PH-1) are marked ACTIVE, but the ad account carries account_issue 'UNSETTLED - billing balance must be paid before ads deliver', so delivery (and therefore lead generation) is itself in question. No Meta Lead Ads forms exist and no lead-form-to-sheet/CRM bridge is configured.

lead_check_state.json sheet_id/tab_name still null; header_row_validated=false; last_check still null.
WATI not_setup: no inbound WhatsApp capture and no automated HOT-lead escalation path to the sales agent.
HubSpot not_setup: no CRM persistence beyond _completed/{date}/ files.
Brevo status 'active' per state file but unverified this run.
Meta ad account UNSETTLED: billing balance must be paid before ads deliver, so paid lead generation is itself in doubt.

UNCONFIRMED STATE FLIP persists: campaign_state.json has been LIVE / simulation=false since the 2026-06-03 update with no staged task queue and no human sign-off found in the project tree, and no _queue/ folder for today.
campaign_state.json is stale (last_updated 2026-06-03; campaign_day field reads 6 vs actual elapsed 15).
suggested_actions: Authorize a Google Sheets (or Drive) MCP connector for unattended scheduled runs, then register the 'PANGLAO PRIME VILLAS - LEAD PIPELINE' sheet_id and tab_name in _status/lead_check_state.json and set header_row_validated=true.
Validate the sheet header row against expected_lead_schema before the first live poll.
Stand up WATI (account + Client ID + sales-agent WA number) so HOT-lead escalation can be automated; until then HOT leads must be escalated manually.
Confirm whether the 2026-06-03 LIVE flip was intentional and human-authorized. If not, revert campaign_state.json to PRE_LAUNCH / simulation=true until at least one lead source is live.
Settle the Meta ad account billing balance so ads can deliver and generate leads.
Refresh campaign_state.json (last_updated and campaign_day) to reflect actual elapsed days.
Fix the LEAD_CHECK cron so it fires at the documented 13:00 PHT slot.

state_writes.lead_check_state_json: NOT MODIFIED (outside this agent's write scope per CLAUDE.md; only _completed/ and _status/cowork_heartbeat.json are writable). last_check intentionally remains null since no successful poll occurred.

hebrew_summary: סיכום בדיקת לידים 2026-06-11 (יום קמפיין בפועל 15): המערכת מסומנת LIVE (simulation=false), אך אין מקור לידים שניתן לקרוא ממנו עבור קמפיין הווילות. נבדק המחבר היחיד הזמין שקולט לידים (Gmail): לא נמצאו פניות או התראות טופס יצירת קשר ביומיים האחרונים. ארבע התוצאות שהופיעו אינן לידים: שרשור פניית קבלן של בלופרינט (עסק נפרד ואסור, לא נגענו בו), שתי התראות מנהלתיות מ-Google Ads על הוספת משתמש חדש לחשבון, וניוזלטר שיווקי לא רלוונטי. הגיליון 'PANGLAO PRIME VILLAS - LEAD PIPELINE' (בבעלות ceo@blue-everest.com) קיים אך אינו רשום ב-lead_check_state.json ואין מחבר Google Sheets/Drive מורשה לפתוח אותו. WATI ו-HubSpot עדיין לא מוגדרים, ולכן אין קליטת לידים בוואטסאפ ואין הסלמה אוטומטית של ליד חם לסוכן המכירות. חשבון המודעות במטא עדיין UNSETTLED. ערוצים שאפשר לקלוט בהם לידים היום: אין אף ערוץ פעיל וניתן לקריאה. מה חסום: Google Sheets לא מחובר, WATI ו-HubSpot לא מוגדרים, חשבון מטא לא שולם, והמעבר ל-LIVE מ-03.06 לא אושר. מה צריך כדי להתחיל: לחבר Google Sheets ולרשום sheet_id ושם טאב, לאמת את שורת הכותרות, להקים WATI להסלמה, ולאשר את מצב ה-LIVE. לא נקלטו, נרשמו או הוסלמו לידים בריצה זו.
